pi_items.source: Task specification in task.json and export_result.sh.
Source code analysis of OpenBCI_GUI/WidgetManager.pde shows the widget is added with title 'Pulse Sensor'.

Source code analysis of OpenBCI_GUI/W_PulseSensor.pde shows the widget reads directly from 'analogChannels[0]' and contains no ChannelSelect UI or dropdown to configure the source channel. Configuring it to 'Channel 2' is impossible.

privileged_info_summary: The correct name of the widget in the OpenBCI GUI is 'Pulse Sensor', not 'Pulse'. Source code analysis confirms that the Pulse Sensor widget has no channel selection configuration in its UI; it hardcodes its data source to the first analog channel. The claim that it can be configured to 'Channel 2' is contradicted and impossible to fulfill. The data source used for testing is synthetic.
